reviews.comment:
Excelente ubicación para quien va para el centro, entrar y cargar, no tienen gnc, como punto malo, pero buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location for those heading downtown; just pop in and fill up. They don't have CNG, which is a downside, but the service is good.

reviews.comment:
Cada vez van mejorando la atención. Pero aun falta mejorar, me dijo uno de los empleados que apagan la maquina para inflar las ruedas por que la usan gente que no carga nafta, pero perjudica a los que si cargamos y queremos usar el servicio.

(Translated by Google)
They're constantly improving their service. But there's still room for improvement. One of the employees told me they turn off the tire inflation pump because it's used by people who don't fill up with gas, but it's detrimental to those of us who fill up and want to use the service.

reviews.comment:
Atención aceptable.
Aceptan tarjetas de crédito, debito y efectivo.
El bar si es una bos ta, caro y horrible la comida o lo que tiene q ver con desayunos/meriendas.

(Translated by Google)
Acceptable service.
They accept credit cards, debit cards, and cash.
The bar is terrible, expensive, and the food, especially breakfast/snacks, is awful.
